raw_consumer_statement: Purchased impact drill on XXXX XXXX XXXX with my costco citi bank credit card and according to tracking number from usps it was delivered on XX/XX/XXXX. I have 4 cameras at home, and went though XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and cameras show no item was never delivered. Opened up a case with usps but told it was delivered even though I stated 4 cameras did not show any delivery of the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX but not help. Opened up dispute with citi bank who opened up case but favored with XXXX. Im out of {$120.00} for item I never received.
